'''Dobbatek''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer from [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]], taken prisoner by the [[Yevetha]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Biography==
Dobbatek managed to escape from the Yevetha, and in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], he was one of the senior officers working with [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Sil Sorannan]]'s secret escape plan.

He was charged with activating the secret [[slave circuit]]ry aboard one of the captured Imperial vessels being used as command ships by the [[Duskhan League]], thereby seizing one of the squadrons of Yevethan-controlled [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] back for the Empire, and taking them to the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].
